items.name: Imperial Regalia Wings
items.description:

items.name: Gold Cog Bladepack
items.description: For the royal guardsmen and the occasional Legacy Cogductor. These blades are considered among the most honored of weaponry to possess. They are the most durable variation along with their unique alterations courtesy of Gr. Cogny's Probability Engine. A mere twist of a gear and the future is made clear. One could say these blades have a mind of their own, willfully choosing to position themselves and their owners where they are needed most.

items.name: ❄️「Frostveil Coat [PBR]」❄️
items.description:
A luxurious long coat wrapped in soft fur trim, designed to keep you warm in the harshest of winters.
The flowing silhouette and plush textures create a balance of elegance and coziness — perfect for icy kingdoms, magical adventures, or winter fashion statements.
✨ Features
Long robe-style coat with fur-lined cuffs and collar
Elegant and cozy PBR texture work
Perfect for fantasy, RPG, or seasonal outfits
Adds a regal, wintery flair to your avatar
🔍 Keywords: winter coat, fur trim, fantasy, elegant, snow, PBR

items.name: Plushie Monster Bundle
items.description:
the goofy plush monster who escaped the toy shelf! This full character bundle comes with everything you need to transform into a squishy, stitched-up creature with big eyes and an even bigger personality.

Whether you love cute, funny, or weird avatars, this plushy pal is perfect for your playful side. Cozy Chomp fits right in with cozy core, monster, and toy-style outfits a must-have for collectors and silly souls alike.

Includes: head, torso, arms, legs fully compatible with layered clothing and emotes.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
